rationale: Keep: the citing paper’s note says it "refines social-barrier accounts" and tests social appropriateness/norm salience as mechanism, while the cited paper specifically shows referral behavior changes via communal-norm compatibility and reduced psychological barrier. This strong construct/mechanism overlap suggests the 2023 paper is likely a substantive theory/mechanism source rather than a generic mention. The pair is directly DOI-matched (10.1177/00222437221117113), supporting that this is the exact referenced work.
